raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.4": 3, "R1.7": 2, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "Mentions one prior work (Marquez & Tan) but doesn't clearly articulate the delta beyond adopting their head.",
    "R1.7": "Fails to identify any missing or wrong citations. The paragraph implicitly relies on several key works in RLAIF and self-rewarding LMs without explicit citation.",
    "RX.1": "Presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty about the novelty claims or empirical results.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly covers the requested dimensions (novelty, calibration, etc.) but drifts into discussing broader RLAIF system aspects and performance claims.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions identified; the critique focuses on potential overreach in claims rather than factual errors.",
    "RX.5": "Does not provide traceability for any of the claims or arguments made."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.4": 0.9, "R1.7": 0.8, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.8, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.7},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: Mentions one prior work (Marquez & Tan) but doesn't clearly articulate the delta beyond adopting their head.
rationale.R1.7: Fails to identify any missing or wrong citations. The paragraph implicitly relies on several key works in RLAIF and self-rewarding LMs without explicit citation.
rationale.RX.1: Presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty about the novelty claims or empirical results.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly covers the requested dimensions (novelty, calibration, etc.) but drifts into discussing broader RLAIF system aspects and performance claims.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions identified; the critique focuses on potential overreach in claims rather than factual errors.
rationale.RX.5: Does not provide traceability for any of the claims or arguments made.
